page_0061.png: InTouch WindowViewer in development mode showing the empty application layout template with a Navigation panel at top-left, Logon overlay at top-right, an empty OverviewDisplay panel at bottom-left, and a ContentDisplay area at bottom-right — all windows are created but empty.
page_0062_0.png: WindowMaker Home ribbon toolbar showing Clipboard group (Paste, Cut, Copy, Duplicate) and Insert group (Button, Text, Graphics, SmartSymbol, Wizards), with the Windows panel on the left listing Unassigned/Template/Backup folders, and an empty Canvas workspace.
page_0062_1.png: WindowMaker New screen displaying Available templates with two options: Native window (white background, basic empty window) and Frame window (light blue background, framed window with controls).
page_0063.png: WindowMaker New screen with the Frame window template selected (highlighted in light blue), ready to create a new frame window.
page_0064.png: Window properties dialog for creating the Navigation window: Name=Navigation, Comment=Display system navigation, Window type=Overlay, Location X:0 Y:0, Size Width:1300 Height:120, Window color=White, Title bar unchecked, Size controls unchecked, with Create button enabled.
page_0065.png: WindowMaker showing the Navigation window successfully created — it appears in the Windows panel tree (highlighted under Unassigned) and as a dashed rectangle on the Canvas, with its properties (Overlay, Location 0,0) displayed in the Properties panel.
page_0066.png: Window properties dialog for creating the Logon window: Name=Logon, Comment=Display logon and clock, Window type=Overlay, Location X:1300 Y:0, Size Width:620 Height:120, Window color=White, Title bar unchecked, Size controls unchecked, with the Width field highlighted for editing.
page_0067.png: WindowMaker showing the Logon window created alongside the Navigation window — both appear in the Windows panel (Navigation and Logon listed), and the Canvas shows the two side-by-side overlay windows.
page_0068.png: Window properties dialog for creating the AlarmDisplay window: Name=AlarmDisplay, Comment=Display live alarms, Window type=Overlay, Location X:0 Y:120, Size Width:1920 Height:200, Window color=White, Title bar unchecked, Size controls unchecked, with Create button ready.
page_0069.png: WindowMaker showing the AlarmDisplay window created and displayed in the Canvas — the three-section split screen (Navigation, Logon, AlarmDisplay) is visible with dashed borders, and AlarmDisplay is highlighted in the Windows panel.
page_0070.png: Window properties dialog for creating the OverviewDisplay window: Name=OverviewDisplay, Comment=Display system overview, Window type=Overlay, Location X:0 Y:320, Size Width:420 Height:680, Window color=White, Title bar unchecked, Size controls unchecked.
page_0071_0.png: Color Dialog window with the Professional tab selected, showing a full RGB/HSL color picker with gradient square, hue slider, RGB values all at 255 (white), and the preview box showing white (#FFFFFF).
page_0071_1.png: Color Dialog window with the Web tab selected, showing the list of standard web color names. Wheat color (#F5DEB3) is highlighted/selected in the list, with the preview box showing the Wheat beige color.
page_0072_0.png: OverviewDisplay window properties dialog now showing Window color set to Wheat (light beige), with the updated color swatch visible, and the Create button ready to finalize the window.
page_0072_1.png: WindowMaker showing the OverviewDisplay window created — the Canvas now displays four window sections (Navigation, Logon, AlarmDisplay, and OverviewDisplay with its Wheat/tan background color visible in the lower-left area).
page_0073.png: Window properties dialog for creating the ContentDisplay window: Name=ContentDisplay, Comment=Display system graphics, Window type=Replace (not Overlay), Location X:420 Y:320, Size Width:1500 Height:680, Window color=White, Title bar checked (enabled), Size controls unchecked.
page_0074_0.png: WindowMaker Windows panel showing all five created windows listed: AlarmDisplay, ContentDisplay (selected), Logon, Navigation, and OverviewDisplay, with the ContentDisplay properties visible in the Properties panel.
page_0074_1.png: WindowMaker Canvas showing the complete application layout with all five windows: Navigation (top), Logon (top-right with dashed border), AlarmDisplay (middle strip), OverviewDisplay (lower-left with Wheat/tan color), and ContentDisplay (large lower-right area with title bar).
page_0075_0.png: WindowMaker Canvas scrolled to the right showing the Logon window, with the Industrial Graphics library open on the right side showing TrainingGalaxy > Industrial Graphic Library > Clocks folder expanded, ready to drag ClockAnalogWall onto the window.
page_0075_1.png: Industrial Graphics library panel showing the expanded Clocks folder under Industrial Graphic Library, listing three clock components: ClockAnalogWall (highlighted/selected), ClockDigital12, and ClockDigital12Date.
page_0075_2.png: WindowMaker Canvas showing the ClockAnalogWall analog clock widget placed on the Logon window, selected with a dashed border, displaying the current time — the clock has a white face, black bezel, and black numerals with hands at approximately 12:00.
page_0076_0.png: InTouch WindowViewer runtime mode showing all five application windows in their configured positions: Navigation (top-left), Logon (top-right with analog clock), AlarmDisplay (middle strip), OverviewDisplay (bottom-left with Wheat background), and ContentDisplay (large bottom-right with title bar).
page_0076_1.png: Close-up of the analog clock widget in WindowViewer runtime, showing a round clock with metallic bezel, white face, black Arabic numerals, and hands displaying the current time (approximately 12:00).
page_0077_0.png: InTouch WindowViewer in runtime mode with the Development! label visible in the top-right corner, showing all five application windows laid out with labels: Navigation, AlarmDisplay, OverviewDisplay, Logon, and ContentDisplay.
page_0077_1.png: Close-up of the analog clock in WindowViewer runtime showing approximately 2:11 with a silver metallic bezel, white face with black numerals, black hour/minute hands, and a red second hand.
page_0078_0.png: WindowMaker File > Configure menu showing the WindowMaker configuration page with various checkboxes including Lock window size (currently unchecked), Enable fast switch (checked), Show grid (checked), and other editor settings.
page_0078_1.png: WindowMaker Configuration of editing environment dialog with the Lock window size checkbox now checked (blue checkmark), along with Enable fast switch and Show grid also checked, and Save button highlighted.
page_0079_0.png: WindowMaker notification dialog box with an information icon, stating: 'WindowMaker configuration successfully updated. It is necessary to restart WindowMaker for the changes to take effect.'
page_0079_1.png: Check-in dialog box for committing changes, with a Comment field containing the text 'Created windows and configured Lock Window Size', an unchecked option to not prompt for comments in the future, and Cancel/Check-in buttons.
